title: The Full 2026 Oscars Winners List - IndieWire
text: Frankenstein won the Oscar for Production Design at the 98th annual Academy Awards ceremony. The film, directed by Guillermo del Toro, was nominated alongside four other competitors: Hamnet, Marty Supreme, One Battle After Another, and Sinners. Del Toro's production design win was part of a strong night for Frankenstein overall. The film secured multiple technical awards in the crafts categories, including victories for Makeup and Hairstyling and Costume Design, demonstrating the production's excellence across various design disciplines. IndieWire's 2026 Oscars winners list confirms that Frankenstein did well in the crafts department, picking up Production Design, Makeup and Hairstyling, and Costume Design kudos.
